title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.890 - Nature and extent of law
text:
521.890.  Nature and extent of law. — This law and the law to which it is amendatory shall be public acts, and shall apply only to the city of St. Louis; and this law shall take effect from its passage.
(RSMo 1939 § 15699) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14751
